paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over a 20-session window. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's CEO departure, governance concerns, and a $375 million convertibles deal. One headline from Stocktwits asks why FRMI stock tumbled more than 28% in after-hours trading, while another from simplywall.st reports on the director exit over governance concerns.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form filed on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. There is one Form 4 filing in the feed.
